# What is the New Helium?

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000427014

We've completely rebuilt Helium from the ground up—sleek, modern, fast, and built to last. The new Helium includes a redesigned web app plus **brand new native iOS and Android apps** , all sharing a consistent experience.

**Helium Classic will remain available through at least Summer 2026** , giving you plenty of time to transition at your own pace. Your data syncs seamlessly between both versions, so you can use whichever works best for you.

## What's New in Helium

The new Helium includes several features not available in Classic:

  * **Native Mobile Apps** — Brand new iOS and Android apps with push notifications. Download from the [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/helium-student-planner/id6758323154) or [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.heliumedu.heliumapp).
  * **Revamped Grades Page** — The widgets at the top of Grades have been completely redesigned to be more action-oriented:
    * **Overall Grade** with trend indicator
    * **Progress vs. Pace** comparing your work completed against time elapsed in the term
    * **At-Risk Classes** highlighting any classes that need attention
    * **Pending Impact** showing ungraded assignments that could most affect your grade
    * **Improved Grade Graph** — The grade trend chart now has enhanced tooltips that let you see how an individual assignment's grade affected both the overall class and term grades at a glance. On mobile, tap and hold to view.
    * Class' category grade breakdown is now easier to view, as a stacked bar chart.
  * **Dark Mode** — Choose between light, dark, or system-synced themes in Settings. See [Changing the App Theme](/support/solutions/articles/159000427001) for details.
  * **Sign in with Google or Apple** — Create an account or sign in using your existing Google or Apple ID instead of a password. See [Signing In with Google or Apple](/support/solutions/articles/159000426995).
  * **Grade Calculator** — Quickly calculate what grade you need on upcoming assignments to reach your target. See [What Grade Do I Need?](/support/solutions/articles/159000426993)
  * **Notebook** — Capture rich-text notes linked to Assignments, Events, or Resources — or keep them standalone. Search and filter everything in one place. See [Linked vs. Standalone Notes](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000429275).
  * **Actionable Links** — Websites and emails that you add to Classes, Resources, and elsewhere now show as tappable buttons, making it easy to launch a site or compose an email directly from Helium.
  * **Smarter Filtering** — The separate Classes filter has been combined with the Filters menu at the top of the Planner. The Complete/Incomplete filter is also improved, and a similar Graded/Ungraded filter was added.
  * **Tooltip Controls** — You can now disable tooltips on the Planner if you prefer a cleaner view.
  * **Fresh Names** — The Calendar is now called Planner, and Materials have been renamed to Resources.
  * **Simplified Registration** — You only need an email address to create an account. Usernames are no longer required.
  * **Lightning Fast** — Snappier performance and a stable, modern foundation across all platforms.

## Retired Features

Some features from Helium Classic are being retired and will not be available in the new Helium:

  * **SMS Reminders** — Text message reminders are being replaced by push notifications in the native mobile apps and browsers, which offer more flexibility and don't require sharing your phone number.
  * **Popup Reminders** — Browser popup reminders have also been replaced by push notifications.
  * **Usernames** — Accounts now use email addresses only for sign-in.
  * **Phone Numbers** — If you registered a phone number for SMS reminders, this information will be removed from Helium's systems when Classic is retired.
